column1: This dataset was manually collected from observations of students who participated in national examinations. Information was recorded regarding student demographics, study habits, school attendance, and examination results. The dataset contains 50 student records and was created specifically for this machine learning assignment.
The first six variables are used as input features, while National_Exam_Result is the target variable to be predicted.
The dataset may contain several quality issues:
* Class imbalance between Pass and Fail categories.
These issues can be handled during preprocessing.
This is a Supervised Learning problem because the dataset contains a known label (National_Exam_Result). The machine learning model learns from historical examples where the outcome is already known.
The dataset can be used to predict whether a student will pass or fail a national examination.
This dataset contains 50 student records related to national examination performance.
It includes demographic information, study behavior, attendance, and previous academic achievement.
Since the dataset contains a clear target variable (Pass/Fail), it is suitable for supervised machine learning classification tasks.
